disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The right-sided discomfort began within minutes to a few hours after receiving an automated text about abnormal liver blood results
trigger_question_examples: What was happening around the time it began?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started right after that text came through about my liver bloods being off. Before that I felt fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The pain is mild, dull and vague, roughly 3/10, intermittent, and eases with distraction
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the pain out of ten?
Is it sharp or dull, constant or coming and going?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a dull ache, maybe a 3 out of 10. It comes and goes and it settles a bit when I sit quietly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild nausea is present but there is no vomiting
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel sick or have you been vomiting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a little queasy but I haven't actually been sick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, rigors or shaking chills reported (patient has not measured a temperature)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, shivering or shaking chills?
Do you feel hot or cold and clammy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't think I have a fever — I don't feel hot and I haven't had the shivers. But I haven't checked with a thermometer.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No yellowing of the eyes or skin noticed
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any yellow colour in your eyes or skin?
Has anyone said you look yellow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I looked in the mirror and my eyes and skin look normal to me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No confusion, drowsiness, easy bruising or unusual bleeding
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt confused, unusually sleepy or hard to keep awake?
Any easy bruising, or bleeding from your gums or nose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my thinking is clear and I haven't noticed any bruising or bleeding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked health anxiety and hypervigilance triggered by the automated result message; repeatedly self-palpating the area
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself about all this?
What are you most worried it might be?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I'm really anxious — I keep pressing on the spot to see if it's getting worse and I've been catastrophising since the text came through.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent paracetamol use, other new medications, or alcohol binge; no known new hepatotoxin exposure
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any paracetamol or new medicines recently?
How much alcohol have you had lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't taken any paracetamol or new tablets, and I've barely had any alcohol — none this week.
